home-services.seoTitle: Hire International Talent for Home Services Companies | Sagan Passport
home-services.seoDescription: Home services companies use Sagan Passport to hire vetted international talent — customer service reps, operations coordinators, and admin staff — for a fraction of US hiring costs.

set.hero.body: You're a trades expert who should be growing revenue, not buried in schedules, phones, and paperwork. Hire operations coordinators, dispatchers, and customer service reps who run the office so you can run the business.
set.talent.subheading: Examples of talent we've recently sourced:
set.caseStudy.body: Aizik Zimerman acquired a plumbing business and grew it to $25M in three years using global talent. Today, nearly half of his 100-person team came through Sagan. His approach: stop thinking "hiring people" and start thinking "buying business functions." Instead of asking how to keep someone busy 40 hours a week, he asks: "What single thing, done every day, would be worth $18,000 a year to my business?" That mindset let him build entire departments for call handling, recruiting, finance, and quality control without inflating overhead.
set.testimonials[0].quote: "We recently hired our first controller. That was a very high-impact, very important role. Sagan searched, vetted, and presented a handful of candidates... it was actually difficult to select one because they were all strong.”
